groups.title: Pentaho & Sensedia
groups.subtitle: ETL & API integration platform
groups.kpiNote: processes on the ETL & API integration backbone
groups.executiveMessage: Pentaho and Sensedia carry the bulk of the estate — 238 flows, 38 of them critical. Formalising monitoring and ownership here protects NAV, pricing and every downstream integration.

drivers.label: External Integrations
drivers.blurb: JPM, Bloomberg, Markit, SFTP files and provider-driven automation flows.

drivers.label: Prices & Market Data
drivers.blurb: Markit, Bloomberg BVAL, price lists, curves and market-data feeds.

drivers.label: Reference & Master Data
drivers.blurb: Instrument, counterparty and entity master data kept in sync.

drivers.label: Fund Accounting & NAV
drivers.blurb: Inputs required for valuation, accounting validations and fund closing.

drivers.label: Reconciliations
drivers.blurb: Cross-checks between Geneva, ODS, custodians, banks and satellite platforms.

drivers.label: Data Quality & Controls
drivers.blurb: Validation, control and data-quality checks across the pipeline.

drivers.blurb: Aggregated lower-volume drivers for this platform.

areas.blurb: NAV, daily close, pricing validations and Geneva-dependent processes.
Brokerage, GPI, derivatives and client-facing investment operations.
FX rates, cash positioning, bank-related inputs and treasury controls.
Index feeds, ODS/eFront consumption and management reporting.
HR, corporate ERP and shared-services automation.

groups.title: BluePrism & UiPath
groups.subtitle: Attended & unattended RPA
groups.executiveMessage: RPA is concentrated on treasury and fund-accounting tasks. Small footprint, but bot failures hit daily close directly — these need a named owner and a resilience plan.

groups.title: Fluig, n8n & Power Automate
groups.subtitle: Workflow & Low-code Automation
groups.executiveMessage: Fluig, n8n and Power Automate handle fund-accounting and reconciliation workflows with no formal support today. Bring them under governance before the footprint grows further.

groups.title: Other Scheduled Jobs
groups.subtitle: Infrastructure & legacy jobs outside the RPA & integration platforms
groups.executiveMessage: These are infrastructure and legacy jobs (SQL Server, RequestBuilder, OIC, Airflow, Drupal, Windows tasks) outside the RPA and integration platforms — inventory and rationalise rather than treat as business automation.

nextSteps.title: Approve a platform-by-process support matrix
nextSteps.body: Define ownership, monitoring priorities and Actus scope across Pentaho/Sensedia, RPA, workflow and legacy jobs.

nextSteps.title: Close the four support gaps
nextSteps.body: Sensedia, UiPath, n8n and Fluig run without formal support — assign owners and a monitoring baseline first.

nextSteps.title: Finish the business-area tagging
nextSteps.body: Every process now maps to a business area — keep the tagging current as new flows are added so coverage and criticality stay complete.
